heading: Step 4: Assign an access policy to your   role.
body:
- Click Copy to copy the access policy generated by Atlas
  and save it locally with the file name: `AtlasS3LogExportPolicy`.

- Click Copy to copy the CLI command generated by Atlas,
  then run the command in your terminal to attach the access policy to
  your AWS (Amazon Web Services) IAM (Identity and Access Management) role.

- Click **Validate** to confirm your configuration and credentials
  are correct before enabling the export.
